reviews.author: Vikram Mehta (Chandigarh)
reviews.reviewText: The wild forest honey is pure and tastes natural. Will order again next season.
reviews.replySuggestion: Dear Vikram, thank you for the feedback! We harvest our honey directly from the Rajaji forest region. Happy that you liked it. Keep supporting our local apiary! 🙏

reviews.author: Priya Sharma (Delhi)
reviews.reviewText: The woollen shawl is warm and colors are bright. But the courier delivery to Delhi took almost 9 days.
reviews.replySuggestion: Hello Priya, thank you for ordering our hand-woven shawl. We are sorry for the delay in shipping. Since our weaving center is in a remote village, transport takes a bit extra time. We are working on a faster courier service for next orders! 🙏

reviews.author: Karan Johar (Mumbai)
reviews.reviewText: Amazing views of the Himalayas and homely food cooked by Raj's family. Very clean room.
reviews.replySuggestion: Hi Karan, thank you for staying with us at Raj Homestay! It was our pleasure hosting you in Mussoorie. Hope to see you and your friends again in the winters! 🙏

captions.captionText:
🧣 Handcrafted with love by our local weavers! Presenting the all-new [Pashmina Shawl]. Every thread is woven by hand using traditional designs passed down through generations. 

📦 Shipments across India. Help keep our craft heritage alive! 

#VocalForLocal #MakeInIndia #HandloomWeavers #TraditionalCrafts #PashminaShawl
